untranslatable_reason: Head and Shoulders Bottom pattern requires detection of three specific swing points (left shoulder, head, right shoulder) and construction of a neckline with slope variation logic. The pattern's core rule depends on comparing close price against a dynamically-constructed neckline (not a standard indicator) and handling two distinct breakout conditions based on neckline slope direction. These multi-point structural features cannot be reliably expressed using only single-bar or standard indicators without custom pattern recognition logic.
